name: Albemarle Parks And Rec
description: Come play pickleball at Albemarle Parks And Rec in Albemarle, NC! There are 3 courts. 1 is indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Anderson Grove Family LIfe Center
description:
"Pickleball On Demand" 
 $30.00 per court/per hour.  Reservations Only.
address: 2225 E. Main and Anderson Gr. Ch. Road

name: Rock Creek Park
description: Rock Creek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Albemarle, NC. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Stanly County Family YMCA
description: Stanly County Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Albemarle, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Waddell Center
description: Come play pickleball at Waddell Center in Albemarle, NC! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
